Klasse ArticleManager

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ArticleManager
public class ArticleManager extends Object
ArticleManager with intelligent caching for improved performance. Features: - LRU (Least Recently Used) cache for frequently accessed articles - Thread-safe cache operations - Automatic cache invalidation on updates/deletes - Configurable cache size

    • getCacheStats

      public Map<String,Object> getCacheStats()
      Get cache statistics for monitoring

      Map of cache statistics

    • existsArticle

      public boolean existsArticle(String articleNumber)
      Check if an article exists by its article number
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - Article number to check
      Gibt zurück:
      true if exists, false otherwise

    • insertArticle

      public boolean insertArticle(Article article)
      Insert a new article into the database
      Parameter:
      article - Article to insert
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • updateArticle

      public boolean updateArticle(Article article)
      Update an existing article in the database
      Parameter:
      article - Article to update
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • deleteArticleByNumber

      public boolean deleteArticleByNumber(String articleNumber)
      Delete an article from the database by its article number
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - Article number to delete
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise

      public boolean deleteArticle(Article article)
      Delete an article from the database
      Parameter:
      article - Article to delete
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • getArticleByNumber

      public Article getArticleByNumber(String articleNumber)
      Retrieve an article by its article number
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - Article number to retrieve
      Gibt zurück:
      Article object or null if not found

    • getArticleByName

      public Article getArticleByName(String name)
      Retrieve an article by its name
      Parameter:
      name - Name of the article to retrieve
      Gibt zurück:
      Article object or null if not found

      public List<Article> getAllArticles()
      Retrieve all articles from the database

      public boolean removeFromStock(String articleNumber, int quantity)
      Remove a specified quantity from an article's stock
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - Article number to update
      quantity - Quantity to remove
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise

      public boolean addToStock(String articleNumber, int quantity)
      Add a specified quantity to an article's stock
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - Article number to update
      quantity - Quantity to add
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise
